content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:6 SecureField) but review_information uses placeholder credentials/notes ("test"/"changeme"/"TBD" in demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt, notes.txt).
Pierre: Apple reviewers cannot access core features if login credentials are placeholders like "test"/"changeme", which commonly leads to a 2.1 rejection for incomplete information. Provide a real, working demo account and detailed notes explaining how to reach any gated features (e.g., subscription content) before submission.
